summary: Add 'events price-bands --dma <id> --window N' SQL aggregation that buckets priceRanges.min into <$50 / $50-100 / $100-200 / $200+ bands grouped by classification.
reason: Persona D pain (newsletter analytics). priceRanges.min is in the spec; mechanical bucketing — no API analog.
validated_outcome: --help pass; missing-price events bucketed as 'unknown' (Discovery omits priceRanges on resale/dynamic-priced events, documented in the brief's data-model quirks).
